description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironWear your thumb print on your tee and leave your impression wherever you go with this white  tantra t-shirt.
